title: Beer Is My Cardio Hilarious Drinking Humor Design
description:
Some people hit the treadmill, others hit the bar—life's all about balance, right? Embrace your healthy beverage-to-hand coordination with this laugh-out-loud design that prioritizes hops over hoops. Whether you're at a brewery, a backyard BBQ, or just cracking open a cold one after a long day of adulting, it's the perfect excuse to skip leg day (again). 

Perfect for: 
- Beer lovers who appreciate a good brew—and a better joke. 
- Anyone who trades cardio for carbonation. 
- Gift it to your favorite beer enthusiast, pub regular, or brewery tour buddy.

DETAILS: Bold typography spells out 'BEER IS MY CARDIO' in a playful, beer-inspired style. Dual-mode design is made to look great on both light and dark backgrounds. Made-to-order to keep things sustainable and unique every time.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
